title: Settlement risk has a name in TradFi: Herstatt risk.
snippet: Fogo (@fogo): Settlement risk has a name in TradFi: Herstatt risk. Named after a German bank that failed mid-settlement in 1974. The receiving party transferred funds. The paying party never delivered.
